Entry.JapaneseText: Thief RTM
Entry.EnglishText: Thief RTM

Entry.JapaneseText: いってぇー！ タンコブ出来ちまったー！
Entry.EnglishText: Owww! I got a bump!

Entry.JapaneseText: 強ぇ！ あんなのが相手なんて聞いてねぇぜ！
Entry.EnglishText: So strong! I never heard anything about goin' up against someone this tough!

Entry.JapaneseText: ウゲェ、あいつメチャクチャ強いじゃねぇーか！
Entry.EnglishText: Ugh, they're hella strong!

Entry.JapaneseText: 俺らの悪行にマジになっちゃってどーすんのよ？
Entry.EnglishText: Why're you takin' our misdeeds so seriously?

Entry.JapaneseText: 痛い目に遭うなら賊はやめだ！ 明日から働くぞ！
Entry.EnglishText: If I gotta suffer pain like this, I'm done bein' a thief! Startin' tomorrow, I'm gettin' a job!

Entry.JapaneseText: ひゃっはー！ ブチのめしてやろうぜ！
Entry.EnglishText: Hiyaaaaa! Let's beat the crap outta 'em!

Entry.JapaneseText: ひゃっはー！ ブチのめされちまったぜ…
Entry.EnglishText: Hiyaaaaa! I got the crap beaten outta me...

Entry.JapaneseText: こんな強い奴が相手なんて、冗談じゃないよー！
Entry.EnglishText: Havin' an opponent this tough is no joke!

Entry.JapaneseText: タダモンじゃねぇぞ！ 油断すんな！
Entry.EnglishText: They're no ordinary folks! Don't let your guard down!

Entry.JapaneseText: こっから本気出す！
Entry.EnglishText: I'm gettin' serious now!

Entry.JapaneseText: ムチャクチャにしてやろうぜー！
Entry.EnglishText: Let's mess 'em up!

Entry.JapaneseText: 何か楽しくなってきたぜ！ うひょー！
Entry.EnglishText: This is gettin' kinda fun! Hell yeeeeah!

Entry.JapaneseText: オラオラ！ 道をあけやがれ！
Entry.EnglishText: Hey! Outta my way!

Entry.JapaneseText: ううぅ、足がすくむぜ…
Entry.EnglishText: Ugh, my legs are all frozen up...

Entry.JapaneseText: ひぃぃ！ 俺の…俺の足が…肉離れに…
Entry.EnglishText: AHHHH! My... My leg... I tore a muscle...

Entry.JapaneseText: ドサクサに紛れて俺は逃げるぜ！
Entry.EnglishText: Gonna take advantage of the chaos and get outta here!

Entry.JapaneseText: ひっぐ、なにずんだよー！
Entry.EnglishText: *Hiccup* The heck's goin' on?!

Entry.JapaneseText: 野郎！ これ以上はさせねぇー！
Entry.EnglishText: Bastard! I ain't lettin' ya do more than that!

Entry.JapaneseText: つ、強ぇ！ 兄貴と呼ばせてくれ！
Entry.EnglishText: S-So strong! Lemme call you Big Bro!

Entry.JapaneseText: 邪魔するならブッ潰す！ 邪魔しなくてもブッ潰す！
Entry.EnglishText: Get in my way and I'll crush ya! Even if ya don't get in my way, I'm gonna crush ya!

Entry.JapaneseText: 強ぇ…ボコられてんのに、憧れちまうぜ
Entry.EnglishText: So strong... Even though I'm gettin' whooped, I gotta admire 'em.

Entry.JapaneseText: 俺らは負けねぇ！ そこんとこヨロシク！
Entry.EnglishText: We won't lose! That said, good luck to ya!

Entry.JapaneseText: 母ちゃんの為ならえんやこら！
Entry.EnglishText: If it's for the sake of my mom, I'll fight!

Entry.JapaneseText: お前らなんか大嫌いだ！ ろくなもんじゃねぇ！
Entry.EnglishText: I hate you people! You lowlives!

Entry.JapaneseText: 金目のもんを置いて行けー！
Entry.EnglishText: Leave your valuables behind!

Entry.JapaneseText: 俺らと出会った不幸を呪いやがれ！
Entry.EnglishText: Curse your own misfortune that you ran into us!

Entry.JapaneseText: イイ加減に潰れろ！
Entry.EnglishText: Just get beat up already!

Entry.JapaneseText: これ以上はやらせねぇぞ！
Entry.EnglishText: I won't let ya do any more than that!

Entry.JapaneseText: 俺達ァ健康優良犯罪集団だぜ！！
Entry.EnglishText: We're a physically fit, superior gang!

Entry.JapaneseText: うわぁ！ 仲間の首が！ ムチウチに！
Entry.EnglishText: Whoa! My comrade's head! It flew off!

Entry.JapaneseText: そう簡単に終わってたまるかよ！
Entry.EnglishText: I ain't gonna let it end that easy!

Entry.JapaneseText: 数だ！ 数で押し切るしかねぇ！
Entry.EnglishText: Use numbers! We gotta overcome 'em with sheer numbers!

Entry.JapaneseText: テメーら、ビビるんじゃねぇぞー！
Entry.EnglishText: Don't you guys go gettin' scared!
